creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
ASSP distfile was updated without a version change.  Changelog is:

- It is now possible to click on IP and email addresses in the MaillogTail 
dialog. This action will open a new browser dialog with several
actions for the addresses.
- The same dialog could be started from left Main Menu (work with 
addresses - work with IP's).
- The same action could be used by admins from BlockReports - click on
the IP or the '@' after any email address.

How-To-Repeat: 	See attached diff.
